# --- verified promotions (evidence per line) ---
0x800431C0  # verified: Ghidra `cb_data` (63 insns, real prologue/body/epilogue); registered as CD callback — xref PARAM from `cb_read` (0x80042F78) and `cd_read_retry` (0x80043460); bytes absent from generated C; runtime dispatch-miss risk when CD callback fires
0x80040C20  # verified: Ghidra `SENDPAD_OBJ_A4` (named in symbol DB); xref READ from `_send_pad` (0x80040BE0); bytes absent from generated C
0x80040C30  # verified: Ghidra `SENDPAD_OBJ_B4` (named in symbol DB, 11 insns, real function); bytes absent from generated C; likely PAD object-table sibling of 0x80040C20
0x8001C8DC  # verified: decomp `WorkListsFreeAllEntries` (system/work_list.c — walks list invoking free callbacks); first insn absorbed into func_8001C84C tail (range 0x8001C84C+0x94), rest split as func_8001C8E0; NO dispatch case at 0x8001C8DC → indirect call FAIL-FASTs
0x8001C9F8  # verified: decomp `WorkListUpdate` (system/work_list.c — per-frame work-list dispatcher, walks g_WorkList calling onTriggerCallback); reached only via function pointer; bytes absent from generated C
0x80024FB8  # verified: decomp `GfxFreeWorkBuffers` (system/temp1.c — HeapFree(g_GfxWorkBuffers) + func_8001D2A4, callees confirmed in disasm); overlay/indirect-only caller; bytes absent from generated C
0x8003218C  # verified: decomp `HeapFreeBlocksWithFlag` (system/memory.c — heap sweep by content flag, module-transition teardown); bytes absent from generated C
0x80032B64  # verified: decomp `HeapCalloc` (system/memory.c — zeroing allocator, public engine API called from game overlays); bytes absent from generated C
0x8003BFA0  # verified: decomp `SoundSpuIRQHandler` (system/sound.c — installed via SpuSetIRQCallback, interrupt-context entry invisible to JAL walker); bytes absent from generated C
